title: Bitou Young Pirates drop crucial points
description: PLETTENBERG BAY NEWS - Reigning Safa Eden...
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"PLETTENBERG BAY NEWS - Reigning Safa Eden Hollywoodbets Regional League champions Bitou Young Pirates went down 4-2 against Black Cats in a entertaining fixture at Lawaaikamp Stadium in George on Saturday 8 March.","html":"PLETTENBERG BAY NEWS - Reigning Safa Eden Hollywoodbets Regional League champions Bitou Young Pirates went down 4-2 against Black Cats in a entertaining fixture at Lawaaikamp Stadium in George on Saturday 8 March."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"Viwe \"Mr Cool\" Mawindi, Lihle Toto, Shane-Lee Windvogel and Mpunzi \"Scara\" Kalolo scored for the Cats, and Anathi Jonas and Thembalethu Hermans for the Kwanokuthula outfit."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"High tempo","html":"High tempo"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"With 36 points, George's Cats are in third position in the Safa Eden log table, fighting for the top spot, and Pirates are battling their way towards the top.","html":"With 36 points, George's Cats are in third position in the Safa Eden log table, fighting for the top spot, and Pirates are battling their way towards the top."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Cats started the fixture at a high tempo, and Toto missed his first chance of the game.","html":"Cats started the fixture at a high tempo, and Toto missed his first chance of the game."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Then Mawindi beat Pirates goalkeeper Mihlali Ziwani with a powerful header inside the box.","html":"Then Mawindi beat Pirates goalkeeper Mihlali Ziwani with a powerful header inside the box."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Offensive play","html":"Offensive play"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Pirates chased the game, playing offensively, but the Cats, using their pace on the flanks, broke through the Pirates back line, and Toto scored for the home side.","html":"Pirates chased the game, playing offensively, but the Cats, using their pace on the flanks, broke through the Pirates back line, and Toto scored for the home side."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Bongile Tabata, right, of Pirates gets the ball away from Lihle Toto of Black Cats.","html":"Bongile Tabata, right, of Pirates gets the ball away from Lihle Toto of Black Cats."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The Plett side relied on the speed of Zukisani Msyesha to turn back Cats defenders.","html":"The Plett side relied on the speed of Zukisani Msyesha to turn back Cats defenders."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"The second half saw Pirates building passes from the centre, employing the strength of Anathi Jonas and Thami Dawethi, supported by Siyabonga Sodumo up front."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Cats were enjoying the game, interlinking passes from the centre, and Pirates battled to overcome a strong attack by the Cats wingers.","html":"Cats were enjoying the game, interlinking passes from the centre, and Pirates battled to overcome a strong attack by the Cats wingers."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Windvogel netted Cats' third goal, and thereafter Pirates were awarded a penalty inside the box after a dangerous tackle by a Cats backline player.","html":"Windvogel netted Cats' third goal, and thereafter Pirates were awarded a penalty inside the box after a dangerous tackle by a Cats backline player."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Soft penalty","html":"Soft penalty"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Jonas scored from the spot, making it 3-1. Then the Pirates back line handled the ball inside their box, giving away a soft penalty to Cats, from which Kalolo scored their fourth goal.","html":"Jonas scored from the spot, making it 3-1. Then the Pirates back line handled the ball inside their box, giving away a soft penalty to Cats, from which Kalolo scored their fourth goal."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Pirates threw everything into the game in the dying moments and were awarded a second penalty inside the box after a malicious tackle. Hermans scored from the spot to make it 4-2.","html":"Pirates threw everything into the game in the dying moments and were awarded a second penalty inside the box after a malicious tackle. Hermans scored from the spot to make it 4-2."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]
